summary: Tested Food Order Status Flow, Rating System, and Store Reviews. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Order tracking page shows progress steps and rating, Store page shows reviews modal with distribution. Fixed store navigation bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order status flow and rating system fully working. Store has 5.0 rating with 1 review. Reviews modal shows rating distribution. FoodPage store navigation was fixed to use /food/store/ route.

order_status_flow.details: Order tracking page shows 6-step progress (pending→confirmed→preparing→ready→out_for_delivery→delivered) with visual indicators

admin_status_update.details: API POST /api/food/orders/store/orders/{id}/status working for admin and seller

rating_system.details: Rating modal appears for delivered orders, store rating updates automatically

store_reviews.details: Reviews modal shows average rating, distribution chart (5/4/3/2/1 stars), and individual reviews with customer names

notifications.details: Notification created on status change per API code

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: StoreCard component using wrong route /store/${store.id} instead of /food/store/${store.id}
